name: Idea Acquisition Corp.
business: The company is a blank check company incorporated on September 18, 2025 as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. We have neither engaged in any operations nor generated any revenue to date. Our primary focus is on identifying and acquiring a company operating in the software vertical that leverages large language models or other AI tools.

exposures.sentence: We may pursue an initial Business Combination in any business or industry, but expect to target opportunities and companies that are operating at the infrastructure layer of the blockchain and digital asset ecosystem.
Our primary focus is on identifying and acquiring a company operating in the software vertical that leverages large language models or other AI tools.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial Business Combination
catalysts.sentence: We have 24 months from the closing of our initial public offering (IPO or Initial Public Offering), or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve (the Completion Window), to complete our initial Business Combination.
